evidence.quote: The bill would provide that no student could be discriminated against or penalized by a school operated by a school district for the following:  (1) engaging in religious, political, or ideological speech or viewpoint when other students are engaging in similar activities;
The bill would allow one or more students to organize religious, political, or ideological clubs or organizations.

uncertainties: Any fiscal effect associated with SB 421 is not reflected in The FY 2027 Governor's Budget Report.
a fiscal effect estimate was not provided
